headline: 2 Lesser Discussed AI Stocks Worth Keeping a Close Eye On
summary: We've all become adjusted to a few of the mega-popular stocks involved in the broader AI trade, namely NVIDIA, Palantir, and Vertiv, to just name a small trio. But there are others that investors should keep an eye on.

headline: Teradyne Rides AI Test Demand And 5G Growth But Valuation Questions Rise
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) reported strong Q4 2025 results, with earnings and revenue above prior expectations. The company guided to higher activity in Q1 2026, supported by demand for semiconductor test equipment linked to AI chip production. Teradyne and its subsidiary LitePoint agreed to work with Aethertek and Metanoia to support 5G Open RAN ecosystem deployments. The combination of AI related chip orders and 5G collaboration highlights fresh demand drivers for Teradyne's test and...

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower after reports suggested that the White House is planning more rules for foreign buyers of large quantities of US chips. The drop comes amid a broader decline in growth-oriented tech stocks.

headline: Is Teradyne (TER) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its 191% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Teradyne's share price still reflects fair value after a strong run, you are not alone. That is exactly what this article will unpack. The stock last closed at US$305.58, with returns of 8.0% over 30 days, 47.2% year to date, 191.0% over 1 year and 202.9% over 3 years. These figures can change how investors think about both upside and risk. Recent coverage around Teradyne has focused on its role in the semiconductor space and how investors are reassessing...
